creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
This is a duplicate of PR ports/163734, See:
	http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/163734

I assume that this can be closed. Thanks,

	jaap


    Maintainer of dns/ldns,
    
    Please note that PR ports/163810 has just been submitted.
    
    If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
    you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
    and a committer will take care of it.
    
    The full text of the PR can be found at:
        http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/163810
    
    -- 
    Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
    edwin@FreeBSD.org
